pi_items.source: verifier.py GRAPH*_TITLE constants and task.json description
task.json description explicitly states this occupation
Task data sources (AWS CloudWatch, EC2, ELB) and task description match this industry
export_result.sh script and verifier.py RESULT_PATH constant

privileged_info_summary: The task successfully uses real AWS CloudWatch and web traffic metrics from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset. All task parameters, including the dashboard name ('Traffic Distribution Report') and the exact titles of the three required graphs ('Traffic Share Percentage', 'Cumulative LB Requests', 'Network Ingress Volume'), are strictly verified against the instructions and verifier.py checks. The requested functions (asPercent, integral with blue color, and cactiStyle) perfectly match the scoring logic in the verifier. The role (Network Reliability Engineer), industry (Cloud Infrastructure), and result file path (/tmp/traffic_dist_result.json) are also accurately reflected in the prompt and export scripts.
